description: A set of three vintage-style pixelated objects, reminiscent of early video games or a retro aesthetic. The largest is a tall, light blue cabinet with a wider base that has two drawers with yellow knobs. The upper part of the cabinet is a narrow, multi-shelf display case with grid-like openings, revealing a checkered pattern inside. To the right, a wall-mounted grandfather clock with a dark wood finish features a round clock face with visible hands. Below the clock is a small, teal-colored stool with a delicate, almost icy appearance, supported by thin, spindly legs. The overall presentation suggests a curated collection of decorative furniture pieces with a distinct pixelated charm.
